data.title: Russia’s crypto market expected to reach $24 billion

The forecast comes after Moscow took a series of steps in the past months to organize and regulate this segment of its digital economy, still strictly reserved for […]

data.title: Peter Brandt Warns Robinhood Latest Feature as ‘Toxic’ for Social Media
data.description:

data.title: Hyperliquid tops Nasdaq’s 2024 net income, beats Robinhood’s trading volume 4 months in a row
data.description:
Decentralized derivatives exchange Hyperliquid has consistently outperformed traditional finance giants in terms of volume and net income. DefiLlama data estimates Hyperliquid’s annualized net income at $1. 24 billion as of Sept. 12, exceeding Nasdaq’s $1
source: https://cryptoslate.com/hyperliquid-tops-nasdaqs-2024-net-income-beats-robinhoods-trading-volume-4-months-in-a-row/

data.title: Bitcoin Hash Rate Hits Record 1.12B TH/s as Network Difficulty Surges – Will BTC Break $117K?
data.description:
Bitcoin's hash rate reached a milestone of 1. 12 billion TH/s on September 12 while network difficulty simultaneously achieved a record peak of 136. 04T, reflecting increased miner confidence as they maintain reserves at a 50-day peak of 1. 808 million BTC rather than liquidating, positioning Bitcoin to potentially overcome its 3-week resistance level at $117K.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-hash-rate-hits-record-1-12b-th-s-as-network-difficulty-surges-will-btc-break-117k/

data.title: Bitcoin Exchange Gemini Makes A Splash On Nasdaq Debut,  Jumping Nearly 50%
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) and cryptocurrency exchange Gemini (GEMI), founded by twins Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, experienced a major debut on the Nasdaq, soaring nearly 40% following the company’s initial public offering (IPO), which raised $425 million. Gemini Success On Nasdaq Debut Based in New York, Gemini priced its IPO late Thursday above the anticipated range of $24 to $26, reflecting strong investor interest. This valuation positioned the company at approximately $3. 3 billion before trading commenced
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/bitcoin-exchange-gemini-makes-a-splash-on-nasdaq-debut-jumping-nearly-50/
